creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Lars Engels from comment #2)
Here's root's environment variables:

TERM=xterm-256color
BLOCKSIZE=K
MAIL=/var/mail/root
PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin
SHELL=/bin/csh
HOME=/root
USER=root
HOSTTYPE=FreeBSD
VENDOR=amd
OSTYPE=FreeBSD
MACHTYPE=x86_64
SHLVL=1
PWD=/root
LOGNAME=root
GROUP=wheel
HOST=somehost
REMOTEHOST=someotherhost
EDITOR=ee
PAGER=less
VISUAL=ee

Here's /etc/make.conf in its entirety:

KERNCONF=XENGUEST

# DTrace for both base and ports. See https://wiki.freebsd.org/DTrace/KernelSupport.
STRIP=
CFLAGS+=-fno-omit-frame-pointer
WITH_CTF=1

WITH_PKGNG=yes
WITH_BDB6_PERMITTED=yes
WITH_SSP_PORTS=yes
WRKDIRPREFIX=/usr/ports/workdirs

EMACS_PORT_NAME=emacs-nox11
TEX_DEFAULT=texlive

DEFAULT_VERSIONS=apache=2.4 bdb=6 firebird=2.5 gcc=4.9 ghostscript=9 lua=5.2 mysql=5.7 perl5=5.24 pgsql=9.6 php=7.0 python=2.7 python2=2.7 python3=3.6 ruby=2.2 ssl=openssl tcltk=8.6
